text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo calls me over the morning after we
return from a break.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Could you fetch my bag from the entryway?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You also have my permission to carry it all the
way to the classroom for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I still feel very sleepy... which is why you should
make yourself as useful as possible at times like
this.
